summary: None of the retrieved documents address the use of flexible instruments in creating adequate femoral tunnel lengths at 90° of knee flexion during ACL reconstruction. Due to the lack of empirical studies demonstrating success in this specific configuration, asserting their ability to produce appropriate tunnel dimensions remains unsupported clinically. \boxed{B}
